problem_text_cn: 1032 人的质量设为$M$，每个小球的质量同设为$m$，取较长的抛球游戏时间，试求地面对人的平均支持力$\overline{N}$。
problem_text_en: 1032 The mass of a person is set to $M$, and the mass of each small ball is set to $m$. For a long period of ball-throwing game, find the average supporting force $\overline{N}$ exerted by the ground on the person.
problem_solution_cn: 【核心思路】以“人+3个小球”为系统，较长时间内系统**竖直方向质心平均加速度为0**，合外力的平均值为0。竖直方向受力：重力$(M+3m)g$、地面平均支持力$\overline{N}$，由平衡条件得$\overline{N}=(M+3m)g$。
problem_solution_en: 【Core Idea】Take the "person + 3 small balls" as the system. The average acceleration of the center of mass of the system in the vertical direction is 0 over a long period of time, so the average value of the resultant external force is 0. Forces in the vertical direction: gravity $(M+3m)g$ and the average supporting force $\overline{N}$ from the ground. From the equilibrium condition, $\overline{N}=(M+3m)g$.
